---
title: "nemascan-sims-nf"
---

Pipeline documentation for `nemascan-sims-nf` — a Nextflow pipeline that
simulates GWAS for *C. elegans* and related nematodes, evaluating the power
and precision of different mapping algorithms.

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'themeVariables': {'fontSize': '20px'}}}%%
flowchart LR
    classDef phase1 fill:#4e9af1,stroke:#2c6fad,color:#fff
    classDef phase2 fill:#48b96e,stroke:#2d8150,color:#fff
    classDef phase3 fill:#e07b3a,stroke:#a3572a,color:#fff
    classDef phase4 fill:#9b59b6,stroke:#6c3483,color:#fff
    classDef io fill:#f5f5f5,stroke:#999,color:#333

    VCF(["Input VCF + strainfile"]):::io

    subgraph P1["Phase 1: Marker Set Generation"]
        A1["bcftools extract & rename"]:::phase1
        A2["PLINK LD pruning (MS + CV)"]:::phase1
        A3["Genotype matrix & eigenvalues"]:::phase1
        A1 --> A2 --> A3
    end

    subgraph P2["Phase 2: Trait Simulation"]
        B1["Select causal variants"]:::phase2
        B2["GCTA simulate phenotypes"]:::phase2
        B3["Variance check & upscaling"]:::phase2
        B1 --> B2 --> B3
    end

    subgraph P3["Phase 3: GWAS Mapping"]
        C1["Build GRM (inbred + loco)"]:::phase3
        C2["Map 4 mode x type combos"]:::phase3
        C1 --> C2
    end

    subgraph P4["Phase 4: QTL Detection & Assessment"]
        D1["DB ingestion (Parquet)"]:::phase4
        D2["QTL interval detection"]:::phase4
        D3["Performance assessment"]:::phase4
        D1 --> D2 --> D3
    end

    OUT(["db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv"]):::io

    VCF --> P1 --> P2 --> P3 --> P4 --> OUT
```

## Reports

- [Marker Set Generation](marker-set-generation.qmd) — Phase 1 process
  documentation covering VCF subsetting, chromosome renaming, LD pruning, and
  genotype matrix creation.
- [Trait Simulation](trait-simulation.qmd) — Phase 2 process documentation
  covering causal variant selection, GCTA phenotype simulation, and PLINK
  fileset preparation.
- [GWAS Mapping](gwas-mapping.qmd) — Phase 3 process documentation covering
  GRM construction, phenotypic variance checking, and association mapping under
  four mode/type conditions.
- [QTL Detection & Assessment](qtl-detection-assessment.qmd) — Phase 4 process
  documentation covering database ingestion, QTL interval detection, and
  performance assessment through both the DB and legacy paths.
- [Database Structure](database-structure.qmd) — Parquet database schema
  reference for marker sets, genotype matrices, simulated trait mappings, trait
  data (metadata, causal variants, phenotypes), and metadata tables.
- [Assessment Cross-Validation](cross-validation.qmd) — How to run and
  interpret the cross-validation analysis comparing DB-path and legacy-path
  assessment outputs.
- [Development Guide](development.qmd) — Contributing guide covering documentation
  authoring, GitHub Pages publishing, and project structure. Includes links to the
  setup page and four testing workflow pages (local end-to-end, integration, HPC,
  and output validation).
- [Setup](setup.qmd) — Local and HPC environment prerequisites: Nextflow version
  pinning, Docker, R packages, Python, bcftools, and Rockfish conda/Singularity
  configuration.
